narrative:
Perry Twp township has 10,410 registered voters, with 59.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 24.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 16.0%, a clear Republican lean of 8.9 percentage points.
